questions.question_text: Hazards (use the findings of your general risk assessment and take account of any parts of your workplace that have different work activities/hazards which may require different levels of first-aid provision) — Space for notes
Does your workplace have low-level hazards such as those that might be found in offices and shops? — Space for notes
Does your workplace have higher-level hazards such as chemicals or dangerous machinery? — Space for notes
Do your work activities involve special hazards such as hydrofluoric acid or confined spaces? — Space for notes
How many people are employed on site? — Space for notes
Are there inexperienced workers on site, or employees with disabilities or particular health problems? — Space for notes
What is your record of accidents and ill health? What injuries and illness have occurred and where did they happen? — Space for notes
Do you have employees who travel a lot, work remotely or work alone? — Space for notes
Do any of your employees work shifts or out-of-hours? — Space for notes
Are the premises spread out, eg are there several buildings on the site or multi-floor buildings? — Space for notes
Is your workplace remote from emergency medical services? — Space for notes
Do any of your employees work at sites occupied by other employers? — Space for notes
Do you have sufficient provision to cover absences of first-aiders or appointed persons? — Space for notes
Do members of the public or non-employees visit your premises? — Space for notes
Appointed person — Required Yes/no
Appointed person — Number needed
First-aider with an emergency first aid at work certificate — Required Yes/no
First-aider with an emergency first aid at work certificate — Number needed
First-aider with a first aid at work certificate — Required Yes/no
First-aider with a first aid at work certificate — Number needed
First-aider with additional training (specify) — Required Yes/no
First-aider with additional training (specify) — Number needed
Dust- and damp-proof first-aid container — Required Yes/no
Dust- and damp-proof first-aid container — Number needed
Kit contents — Required Yes/no
Kit contents — Number needed
Additional equipment (specify), eg foil blankets, eye wash bottles, shears, microporous tape, tourniquets, haemostatic dressings — Required Yes/no
Additional equipment (specify), eg foil blankets, eye wash bottles, shears, microporous tape, tourniquets, haemostatic dressings — Number needed
Defibrillator — Required Yes/no
Defibrillator — Number needed
Travelling first-aid kit — Required Yes/no
Travelling first-aid kit — Number needed
First-aid room — Required Yes/no
First-aid room — Number needed
